---
title: "Supplement: Comparison of nowcasting methods during the 2024-2025 respiratory virus season in Massachusetts"
authors: "To be updated"
format: docx
editor: visual
bibliography: ref.bib
csl: vancouver.csl
output:
  bookdown::docx:
    fig_caption: yes
---

## Additional figures

![Fig. SX Weighted interval score over time across all age groups throughout the 2024-2025 season, alongside epidemiological curve showing the total number of ED visits due to each pathogen over time. Color indicates model, each row is a different pathogen.](../output/figs/supp/state_wis_t.png){#figs1}
